inputs.description:
Seed the agent_authorities + agent_aliases tables and publisher_authorities + publisher_variants tables.

1. Agent authorities:
   cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m app.cli seed_agent_authorities

   This reads the agents table, creates canonical authority records, and generates aliases
   (primary, variant_spelling, cross_script, patronymic, acronym, word_reorder, historical).

2. Publisher authorities (if populate script exists):
   cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run python -m scripts.metadata.populate_publisher_authority

   This needs data/normalization/publisher_research.json. If it doesn't exist, skip this step.

3. Verify:
   python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); aa=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM agent_authorities').fetchone()[0]; al=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM agent_aliases').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Authorities: {aa}, Aliases: {al}')"

Do NOT commit the database.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && python3 -c "import sqlite3; c=sqlite3.connect('data/index/bibliographic.db'); aa=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM agent_authorities').fetchone()[0]; al=c.execute('SELECT count(*) FROM agent_aliases').fetchone()[0]; print(f'Authorities: {aa}, Aliases: {al}'); assert aa > 100"
